meta.label: FreestyleFly 结构化词库 · 商业

entries.title: Personalized Beauty Report
entries.author: freestylefly
entries.prompt:
Recommendation-report layouts for beauty and lifestyle products.

Use a report-like hierarchy with diagnosis, recommendation, and product cards.
Keep product images, labels, and ratings aligned.
Avoid medical claims and unreadable dense notes.
Keep recommendation logic simple.
entries.description: Recommendation-report layouts for beauty and lifestyle products.
entries.descriptionZh: 生成美妆与生活方式产品的推荐报告版式。
entries.promptZh:
生成美妆与生活方式产品的推荐报告版式。

使用诊断、推荐和商品卡片的报告层级。
对齐商品图、标签和评分。
避免医疗化结论和难读小字。
保持推荐逻辑清楚。
entries.displaySummaryZh: 来自FreestyleFly 结构化词库的商业条目《个性化美妆报告》。 关键词：Product、UI、Commerce、Fashion。结构更完整，适合直接导入高级编辑。
entries.searchText: personalized beauty report recommendation-report layouts for beauty and lifestyle products. recommendation-report layouts for beauty and lifestyle products. use a report-like hierarchy with diagnosis, recommendation, and product cards. keep product images, labels, and ratings aligned. avoid medical claims and unreadable dense notes. keep recommendation logic simple. products & e-commerce product ui layout style commerce fashion

entries.title: Brand Touchpoint Board
entries.author: freestylefly
entries.prompt:
Campaign boards across packaging, social, web, and display contexts.

Specify touchpoint list, shared visual rules, and mockup arrangement.
Use one palette and one typography logic across all panels.
Avoid mixing many unrelated campaign styles.
Limit touchpoints if readability drops.
entries.description: Campaign boards across packaging, social, web, and display contexts.
entries.descriptionZh: 生成包装、社媒、网页和展示场景里的品牌触点板。
entries.promptZh:
生成包装、社媒、网页和展示场景里的品牌触点板。

指定触点清单、统一视觉规则和样机排列。
让所有面板共享配色和字体逻辑。
避免混入多个无关 Campaign 风格。
可读性下降时减少触点数量。
entries.displaySummaryZh: 来自FreestyleFly 结构化词库的商业条目《品牌触点视觉板》。 关键词：Brand、Product、Commerce、Social。结构更完整，适合直接导入高级编辑。
entries.searchText: brand touchpoint board campaign boards across packaging, social, web, and display contexts. campaign boards across packaging, social, web, and display contexts. specify touchpoint list, shared visual rules, and mockup arrangement. use one palette and one typography logic across all panels. avoid mixing many unrelated campaign styles. limit touchpoints if readability drops. brand & logos brand product identity campaign commerce social

entries.title: Product Commerce Visual
entries.author: freestylefly
entries.prompt:
Product shots, packaging, detail pages, and selling-point layouts.

Define product, selling points, material, scene, lighting, and layout blocks.
Separate hero product, benefit labels, and supporting props.
Avoid random props that weaken product recognition.
Constrain packaging text and claim wording.
entries.description: Product shots, packaging, detail pages, and selling-point layouts.
entries.descriptionZh: 生成商品图、包装、详情页和卖点排版。
entries.promptZh:
生成商品图、包装、详情页和卖点排版。

定义商品、卖点、材质、场景、光线和版块。
区分主商品、卖点标签和辅助道具。
避免无关道具削弱商品识别。
约束包装文字和卖点表达。
entries.displaySummaryZh: 来自FreestyleFly 结构化词库的商业条目《商品商业视觉》。 关键词：Product、Realistic、Commerce、Food。结构更完整，适合直接导入高级编辑。
entries.searchText: product commerce visual product shots, packaging, detail pages, and selling-point layouts. product shots, packaging, detail pages, and selling-point layouts. define product, selling points, material, scene, lighting, and layout blocks. separate hero product, benefit labels, and supporting props. avoid random props that weaken product recognition. constrain packaging text and claim wording. products & e-commerce product realistic commerce packaging commerce food

entries.title: Brand Identity Package
entries.author: freestylefly
entries.prompt:
Logo, palette, typography, applications, and brand touchpoints.

Define brand name, positioning, palette, typography, logo usage, and touchpoints.
Ask for a coherent board with aligned applications.
Avoid unrelated logo variants and inconsistent palettes.
Keep brand text accurate.
entries.description: Logo, palette, typography, applications, and brand touchpoints.
entries.descriptionZh: 生成 Logo、配色、字体、应用触点与品牌系统。
entries.promptZh:
生成 Logo、配色、字体、应用触点与品牌系统。

定义品牌名、定位、配色、字体、Logo 用法和触点。
要求视觉板中的应用统一对齐。
避免无关 Logo 变体和混乱配色。
保持品牌文字准确。
entries.displaySummaryZh: 来自FreestyleFly 结构化词库的商业条目《品牌身份包》。 关键词：Brand、Logo、Commerce。结构更完整，适合直接导入高级编辑。
entries.searchText: brand identity package logo, palette, typography, applications, and brand touchpoints. logo, palette, typography, applications, and brand touchpoints. define brand name, positioning, palette, typography, logo usage, and touchpoints. ask for a coherent board with aligned applications. avoid unrelated logo variants and inconsistent palettes. keep brand text accurate. brand & logos brand logo identity commerce
